title: Locust Dr Nowhere
description: Adds the Dr nowhere entity Locust
body:
The Locust is a chilling Minecraft horror mod currently in alpha, bringing fear and mystery deep into your survival world. Inspired by psychological horror and creature-based nightmares, this mod introduces a terrifying new entity known only as The Locust—a shadowy being that stalks you from the darkness with glowing, soulless eyes. It doesn't just appear… it lurks, watching and waiting. When it sees you, run—or face the consequences.

Explore corrupted biomes, uncover disturbing structures, and unlock lore through strange whispers and cryptic advancements. This isn't just a visual mod—it changes how you feel about the night.

⚠️ Warning:
This mod is in early alpha and may not function correctly on all devices, especially lower-end phones or PCs. You might experience crashes, missing textures, or bugs. Please be patient as development continues.

If you're a fan of survival horror, tense atmospheres, and being hunted when you least expect it—The Locust is for you. But remember: it’s not just about surviving... it’s about staying sane.

Play at your own risk.
The darkness is watching.
